description_long: This object is a classic chessboard set on a thick, rectangular base with a glossy black finish. The playing surface features a standard 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, sharply defined and evenly spaced. The border of the board is wide, solid black, and slightly raised, giving the set a modern, elegant appearance. Both black and white chess pieces are arranged in their starting positions, with each piece distinctly modeled and proportioned. The chess pieces are traditional Staunton-style, with clear differentiation between pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings. The overall look is sophisticated and suitable for display in public parks, urban plazas, or recreational areas.
description: A glossy black chessboard with a raised border and a standard 8x8 grid of alternating black and white squares, featuring classic Staunton-style chess pieces in starting positions.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the side, showing the black pieces in the foreground and the white pieces in the background, with the glossy black border clearly visible.
description_view_1: This front view displays the white pieces closest to the viewer, all pieces in their starting positions, and the full width of the board's border.
description_view_2: The board is seen from the opposite side, with the white pieces in the foreground and the black pieces in the background, emphasizing the depth of the border.
description_view_3: A direct view of the black pieces in the front row, with the chessboard's alternating squares and raised black border clearly visible.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface consists of a regular grid of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 matrix, with alternating black and white squares forming a classic checkerboard pattern. The squares are perfectly square-shaped and evenly sized, with sharp, clean edges and no decorative elements or inscriptions within the grid.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, solid black band that frames the entire playing area, slightly raised above the surface of the squares. It is smooth, glossy, and unadorned, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings.
